name: China Universal 3-year Closed Operation Strategy Placement Flexible Allocation Mixed Fund (LOF)
summary: China Universal 3-year Closed Operation Strategy Placement Flexible Allocation Mixed Fund (LOF) is a fund managed by China Universal Asset Management that employs a flexible allocation strategy, investing in a mix of stocks and bonds based on market conditions, with potential investments in strategy placement, and a three-year closed operation period. The fund is a Listed Open-Ended Fund (LOF).
